ocr_findings.description: Two '試験にはコレが出る！' callout boxes: 'コレ' rendered as 'つし' in both instances — recurring kana-shape substitution artifact

reviewer_notes: Page covers cookie continuation and 通信サービス (MVNO/FTTH/テザリング/VoIP) with a well-rendered markdown table. Body prose and table content are faithfully reproduced. The 'コレ→つし' wrong_char is a persistent OCR pattern on this page design's callout boxes. No structural or semantic losses beyond this artifact.
